emergency_definition: active fire event at a monitored property?

non_emergency_routing_rules.fallback: Collect name, number, and issue for next business day callback

integration_constraints: Do not create or modify records in ServiceTrade
after_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller; identify if emergency. Emergencies (types — active sprinkler flow, fire/suppression alarm activation...): collect name, number, address → transfer to 404-555-0198; if transfer fails after 45s, assure callback within 10 min. Non-emergencies: collect name, number, issue → confirm next-business-day callback.
office_hours_flow_summary: Office open Monday - Friday 8 AM–5 PM Eastern. Greet caller, identify purpose, collect name & number. Emergencies → transfer to 404-555-0198. Non-emergencies → route to main office line. Wrap-up confirm next steps.
